founderMessage: Oranthus was created to serve global buyers with dependable quality, ethical sourcing, and export-friendly service.
mission: We build reliable supply chains that serve the needs of global food and ingredient markets.
overviewDescription: We partner with local growers and modern processors to export premium dried onions, garlic, and spices. Focused on food safety and strict quality standards, we ensure that every batch is fully traceable and meets international buyer requirements.

values.description: Every batch is checked for consistency, safety, and export readiness.
values.title: Quality First

values.description: We partner with vetted growers and processors with traceable sourcing.
values.title: Transparent Sourcing

values.description: We encourage responsible handling and eco-conscious packaging choices.
values.title: Sustainable Practices

vision: We aim to deliver consistent quality and long-term value to international buyers.

description: Identify reliable Indian manufacturers and suppliers that match your quality, pricing, and volume requirements.
title: Product Sourcing

seoDescription: Oranthus is an India-based export and sourcing company connecting global buyers with reliable Indian products through trusted sourcing, quality assurance, and professional export support.
tagline: Born in India. Built for the World.

ctaDescription: Get in touch with our team to discuss your export requirements and pricing.
